title_original: How to accelerate enterprise Quantum computing adoption using Nvidia and CUDA-Q with a Quantum ops framework approach - QCentroid
summary_original: QCentroid details how combining NVIDIA CUDA-Q and a QuantumOps framework can accelerate enterprise quantum computing adoption in 2024. CUDA-Q offers a unified hybrid programming model, enabling seamless integration of quantum and classical workflows and supporting execution on both NVIDIA GPU-based simulators and physical quantum processing units. This reduces integration complexity, increases scalability, and streamlines development. QuantumOps adds structured experiment lifecycle management, tracking configurations, and ensuring reproducibility. Using QCentroid Launchpad, enterprises gain instant access to cloud-based NVIDIA GPU resources, removing infrastructure bottlenecks. The approach delivers cost control, vendor-agnostic backend portability, and supports scalable, domain-agnostic workflows for tasks like industrial battery electrolyte design. Overall, operational discipline, automation, and infrastructure flexibility are highlighted as key to accelerating enterprise quantum computing workflows.
